raw_title: Convergent Epistemic Practices in Visual Fact-Checking
title_en: Convergent Epistemic Practices in Visual Fact-Checking
title_zh: 视觉事实核查中的趋同认知实践
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在数字新闻环境中，人们如何通过多种方法共同验证视觉内容的真实性，比如图片和视频。它关注不同验证方法如何融合，以提高事实核查的准确性和效率。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how people in digital journalism use multiple methods together to verify the truthfulness of visual content, such as images and videos. It focuses on how different verification approaches converge to improve the accuracy and efficiency of fact-checking.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻中视觉内容验证的方法融合与认知过程，旨在提升事实核查的可靠性和跨平台应用。
research_direction_en: Investigates the convergence of methods and cognitive processes in visual content verification within digital journalism, aiming to enhance the reliability and cross-platform application of fact-checking.
